name: wxcode/admin-meridian-people
title: Meridian People Admin
description: HR and people-operations admin dashboard — warm-professional light mode with indigo accent, left sidebar org/team switcher, 4 KPI tiles (headcount, attendance, open roles, turnover), headcount-over-time chart, department breakdown, employees table, and a time-off requests panel.

query.en: Build me an HR people-operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with org/team switcher, topbar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles for headcount / attendance / open roles / turnover, a headcount-over-time chart, department headcount bars, an employees table, and a time-off requests side panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me an HR people-operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with org/team switcher, topbar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles for headcount / attendance / open roles / turnover, a headcount-over-time chart, department headcount bars, an employees table, and a time-off requests side panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
